query:
-- Step 1: Force-close all open positions (mark as closed)
UPDATE paperPositions 
SET status = 'closed', 
    closedAt = NOW(), 
    unrealizedPnl = 0, 
    unrealizedPnlPct = 0 
WHERE status = 'open';

-- Step 2: Reset ledger to $100K clean with new session 20
UPDATE paperLedger 
SET availableCash = 100000, 
    sessionId = 20, 
    updatedAt = NOW() 
WHERE userId = 1;

-- Step 3: Verify
SELECT userId, availableCash, sessionId FROM paperLedger;
SELECT COUNT(*) as stillOpen FROM paperPositions WHERE status = 'open';
